nasb.text: Older men are to be temperate, dignified, sensible, sound in faith, in love, in perseverance.

esv.text: Older men are to be sober-minded, dignified, self-controlled, sound in faith, in love, and in steadfastness.

cnv.text: 勸年老的男人要有節制、莊重、自律，在信心、愛心、忍耐上都要健全。

ccb.text: 劝年长的男子要节制、庄重、自律，有全备的信心、爱心和耐心。

csbs.text: 年长的男人要节制、庄重、自律，在信仰、爱心和忍耐上要健全；
